chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE SEA WITH THE SUN

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 194)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 194)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يُعَوِّذُ بَعْضَ وُلْدِهِ وَ يَقُولُ عَزَمْتُ عَلَيْكِ يَا رِيحُ وَ يَا وَجَعُ كَائِناً مَا كُنْتِ بِالْعَزِيمَةِ الَّتِي عَزَمَ بِهَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) رَسُولُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَلَى جِنِّ وَادِي الصَّبْرَةِ فَأَجَابُوا وَ أَطَاعُوا لَمَّا أَجَبْتِ وَ أَطَعْتِ وَ خَرَجْتِ عَنِ ابْنِي فُلَانٍ ابْنِ ابْنَتِي فُلَانَةَ السَّاعَةَ السَّاعَةَ.

en.hubeali: H 14494 – Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Jameel Bin Saaleh, from Zareeh who said:

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws seeking refuge for one of hisasws sons and heasws was saying: ‘Iasws am resolved against you, O wind, and O pain, whatever creature you are, with the determination which Aliasws Bin Abu Talibasws and the Messengersaww of Allahazwj held against the Jinn in the valley of Al-Sabrah. So they answered, and they obeyed. You answer and obey, and go away from myasws son so and so, so of myasws daughter so and so, at this very moment, at this very moment’.
en.sarwar: 46. Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Jameel Bin Saaleh, from Zareeh who said: ‘I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) seeking refuge for one of his (a.s.) sons and he (a.s.) was saying: ‘I (a.s.) am resolved against you, O wind, and O pain, whatever creature you are, with the determination which Ali (a.s.) Bin Abu Talib (a.s.) and the Messenger (saww) of Allah (azwj) held against the Jinn in the valley of Al-Sabrah. So they answered, and they obeyed. You answer and obey, and go away from my (a.s.) son so and so, so of my (a.s.) daughter so and so, at this very moment, at this very moment’.
